ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cases" (
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case */,
  "case_number" TEXT /* The official case number */,
  "domain" TEXT /* The domain name(s) in dispute */,
  "complainant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the complainant */,
  "respondent_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the respondent */,
  "ruleset" INTEGER /* The ruleset governing the dispute resolution */,
  "status" INTEGER /* The current status of the case */,
  "decision_date" TEXT /* The date when the decision was made */,
  "arbitrator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the assigned arbitrator */,
  "mediator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the assigned mediator */,
  "filing_date" TEXT /* Date when the case was filed */,
  "hearing_date" TEXT /* Date of the hearing */,
  "decision_details" TEXT /* Detailed description of the decision */,
  "case_value" TEXT /* Estimated value of the case */,
  "case_type" TEXT /* Type of case (e.g., trademark, copyright) */,
  "case_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the case in days */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time of the last update */,
  "documents_url" TEXT /* URL to access case documents */,
  "communication_log" TEXT /* Log of communications related to the case */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cases_arbitrator_id FOREIGN KEY ("arbitrator_id") REFERENCES arbitrators ("arbitrator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cases_complainant_id FOREIGN KEY ("complainant_id") REFERENCES complainants ("complainant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cases_ruleset FOREIGN KEY ("ruleset") REFERENCES rulesets ("ruleset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cases_respondent_id FOREIGN KEY ("respondent_id") REFERENCES respondents ("respondent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cases_status FOREIGN KEY ("status") REFERENCES statuses ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cases_mediator_id FOREIGN KEY ("mediator_id") REFERENCES mediators ("mediator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "complainants" (
  "complainant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each complainant */,
  "complainant_name" TEXT /* Name of the complainant */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the complainant */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the complainant */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the complainant */,
  "registered_date" TEXT /* Date of registration with the organization */,
  "legal_representative" TEXT /* Name of the legal representative */,
  "legal_representative_email" TEXT /* Email of the legal representative */,
  "legal_representative_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the legal representative */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("complainant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "respondents" (
  "respondent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each respondent */,
  "respondent_name" TEXT /* Name of the respondent */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the respondent */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the respondent */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the respondent */,
  "registered_date" TEXT /* Date of registration with the organization */,
  "legal_representative" TEXT /* Name of the legal representative */,
  "legal_representative_email" TEXT /* Email of the legal representative */,
  "legal_representative_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the legal representative */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("respondent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rulesets" (
  "ruleset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ruleset */,
  "ruleset_name" TEXT /* Name of the ruleset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the ruleset */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date the ruleset became effective */,
  "revision_date" TEXT /* Date of the last revision */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the ruleset */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to access the ruleset document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ruleset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  "color_code" TEXT /* Color code for visual representation of the status */,
  "icon" TEXT /* Icon for visual representation of the status */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if this is the default status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "arbitrators" (
  "arbitrator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each arbitrator */,
  "arbitrator_name" TEXT /* Name of the arbitrator */,
  "arbitrator_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the arbitrator */,
  "arbitrator_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number */,
  "arbitrator_bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the arbitrator */,
  "arbitrator_specialization" TEXT /* Specialization area */,
  "arbitrator_status" TEXT /* Current status (e.g., available, busy) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("arbitrator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mediators" (
  "mediator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mediator */,
  "mediator_name" TEXT /* Name of the mediator */,
  "mediator_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the mediator */,
  "mediator_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number */,
  "mediator_bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the mediator */,
  "mediator_specialization" TEXT /* Specialization area */,
  "mediator_status" TEXT /* Current status (e.g., available, busy) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mediator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the case */,
  "document_name" TEXT /* Name of the document */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., evidence, complaint) */,
  "document_url" TEXT /* URL to access the document */,
  "uploaded_by" TEXT /* User who uploaded the document */,
  "uploaded_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "communications" (
  "communication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each communication */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the case */,
  "sender_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sender */,
  "receiver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the receiver */,
  "communication_type" TEXT /* Type of communication (e.g., email, letter) */,
  "communication_date" TEXT /* Date of the communication */,
  "communication_details" TEXT /* Details of the communication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("communication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_communications_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "user_email" TEXT /* Email of the user */,
  "user_role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, staff) */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
